steps.title: Write the line
steps.content: From the table pattern, when $x=0$, the $y$-value is $27$. So the line is $y=-\frac{x}{27}+27$.

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content:
Set $y=0$ to find the $x$-intercept.
$0=-\frac{x}{27}+27$
$\frac{x}{27}=27$
$x=729$
The intercept is $(729,0)$. The answer is D.
